heroH1: A builder's family business. Now making the panel they always wanted.
heroLead: 25 years in the trade. One SIPs panel range built for the people who actually have to lay it on site.
storyH2: Built on jobsites, not in boardrooms.
storyPara1: At ThermaSpan, we believe your build deserves a system you can count on. That's why we've developed a product range that gives builders, tradies, and owner-builders the performance and confidence they need — from the slab up.
storyPara2: As a proudly family-owned business with over 25 years of experience in modular construction and insulated panel supply, we combine deep industry knowledge with a genuine commitment to quality.
storyPara3: Our SIPs panels are engineered for strength, stability and safety. Pre-finished, moisture stable and designed to outperform OSB-based SIPs and traditional framing — they deliver superior structural performance while remaining fast to install on site.
storyPara4: Across Insulspan® roofing, Panelspan® walls and Panelcore® coldroom panels, ThermaSpan products are suitable for residential, commercial, agricultural and controlled-temperature use.
videoH2: A complete envelope, installed in days.
videoLead: Watch a complete two-storey extension reach lock-up using our SIPs system — start to finish, panel by panel. The same factory-precise process every ThermaSpan job uses.
systemH2: A complete building system from ThermaSpan.
systemPara1: When you use Insulspan® roofing and Panelspan® walls together, you get a complete pre-finished building envelope — no additional cladding, no bulk insulation, no separate lining boards.
systemPara2: Every surface arrives ready to paint or finish. Every joint is factory-precise. Every panel is engineered together as one system.
